summary: Added scripts/zone-diff.py: a standard-library Python 3 tool comparing two DNS zone snapshots.
Prints ADDED/REMOVED/CHANGED sections plus a verdict; exit 0 match, 1 differences, 2 usage error.
Tolerant parsing (ignores blank/comment lines, collapses whitespace, case-insensitive name+type).
Added scripts/README.md with a worked example; --selftest runs 4 built-in cases and all pass.
Opened PR #4 and stopped at 'PR ready' — no merge, no deploy, nothing outside this repo.
notes: Canary task #1 per the charter (read-only helper, touches nothing live). Verified end-to-end before opening the PR: --selftest all pass; identical files -> MATCH/exit 0; add+remove+change (incl. TTL change and case-insensitive name match) -> correct sections/exit 1; usage errors -> exit 2; the README worked example matches actual output. No blockers. Hard stop at 'PR ready' — human merge is the only deploy.
